Driver for the eWD1000 touch controller and touch sensor initialization in Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[ewd1000](ewd1000/README.md)**: Driver for the eWD1000 touch controller and definitions for configuring touch sensor hardware interfaces.

## Files
- **[touch_sensor.h](touch_sensor.h.md)**: Initializes the touch sensor in the Pebble firmware.
